description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage. Use the mwienk/docker-lftp Docker image for the deploy:master job, which runs only on the master branch. In the deploy stage, define a job named deploy:master that sets the environment name to master with URL https://git.avamac.com/. The job executes the shell command: lftp -c "set ftp:ssl-allow no; open -u $USERNAME,$PASSWORD $HOST; mirror -Rev web/ ./web  --ignore-time --parallel=10 --exclude-glob .git* --exclude .git/". No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
